<tbox>
- [45] equiv hasVisualFeature(clustered orange and yellow small flowers) and hasVisualFeature(four-lobed distinct flower petals) and hasVisualFeature(dark reddish brown flower buds on green stems)
- [44] equiv hasVisualFeature(purple/lavender flowers with dark central centers)
- [77] equiv hasVisualFeature(large pink/white layered lotus flowers)
</tbox>
<abox>
- hasVisualFeature(Target, [clustered orange and yellow small flowers])
- hasVisualFeature(Target, [four-lobed distinct flower petals])
- hasVisualFeature(Target, [dark reddish brown flower buds on green stems])
</abox>
<dl_explanation>
- The Target Image has all the visual features asserted in the ABox: clustered orange and yellow small flowers, four-lobed petals, and dark reddish brown flower buds on green stems.
- These features exactly match the necessary and sufficient conditions defined in the TBox for class 45.
- The features do not match the defining traits of 44 (purple/lavender flowers) or 77 (lotus flowers), so class 45 is the correct classification.
</dl_explanation>
<response>45</response>

- hasVisualFeature(Target, purple flower petals)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, dark brown floral center)
</abox>

- The Target Image has the visual features of purple flower petals and a dark brown floral center as asserted in the ABox.
- These features satisfy the necessary and sufficient conditions defined in the TBox for Class44, as the training examples for Class44 all have purple petals and dark floral centers.
- The other classes do not match: Class45 features orange-yellow clustered flowers, and Class77 features large pink/white lotus flowers, neither of which match the Target Image.
</dl_explanation>
<response>44</response>
